title: Prime's HD Textures FREE (32x)
description: Minecraft's vanilla textures faithfully re-imagined in full HD with complete PBR support.
body:
![Prime's HD Textures](https://i.imgur.com/FI1apDM.png) #

⚠️[ IMPORTANT ]⚠️
To get 3D and reflective effects to work, you will need to enable LabPBR through a shader. There is an in-depth guide in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/primemods)

##

🌱
**This is the Free version of Prime's HD Textures. Higher resolutions and more available at [primemods.net](https://primemods.net)**

##

🔧
**Follow the pack's development on [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@prime_mods), [Instagram](https://instagram.com/prime_mods), and [TikTok](https://tiktok.com/@prime_mods)

** ##

**👥 Attributions:** **Some temporary placeholder textures with permission by [Gabo Reviews](https://www.youtube.com/@GaboReviews)** **Some temporary specular maps inspired by [AVPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/avpbr-retextured) with permission from JoaquiX** **3D bar models from [Undopia Patch](https://undopia.net/projects/undopia-patch) with permission by UnduGT**
